case_title: ROMMEL SOLANO et al VS. WILLIAM (BILL) DALEY, et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO WILLIAM (BILL) DALEY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-11-2009 AT 8:30AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLANO, ROMMEL CARRILLO, CYNTHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALAMO CAR RENTAL, ET AL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,620.00, COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT ACTED IN BAD FAITH IN NOT PAYING PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TIMELY; DEFENDANT WILLIAM DALEY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BECAUSE WILLIAM DALEY WASN'T PART OF THE INSURANCE CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL, FILED. DISMISSING WITH PREJUDICE 3RD PARTY DEREK WATTS.
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLTF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLANO, ROMMEL CARRILLO, CYNTHIA
CHALLENGE TO VENUE, NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES FILED BY DEFENDANT DALEY, WILLIAM (BILL)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED JUL-15-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALAMO CAR RENTAL, ET AL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: APR-07-2010 (SERVICE FEE $30.00) AS TO DEFENDANT WATTS, DEREK
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT ALAMO CAR RENTAL, ET AL WATTS, DEREK HEARING SET FOR APR-26-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-26-2010 IS CONTINUED, STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO MAY-10-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES AGREED THAT JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL PAY $1757.50 BY CASHIERS'S CHECK TO PLAINTIFF NO LATER THAN 5/10/10. ONCE PAYMENT IS COMPLETE, JUDGMENT CREDITOR WWILL DISMISS DEREK WATTS AS A 3RD PARTY DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-11-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DALEY'S MOTION TO CHALLENGE VENUE IS DENIED. TRIAL AGAINST ALAMO RENT-A-CAR AND DALEY SHALL BE HELD ON SEPTEMBER 11, 2009 AT 8:30. DEFENDANT DALEY MAY REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY SOLANO, ROMMEL CARRILLO, CYNTHIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2009 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $67.50 ACCRUED INTEREST, $70.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO THIRD PARTY WATTS, DEREK
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOLANO, ROMMEL CARRILLO, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT DALEY, WILLIAM (BILL) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-29-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-09-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF AMENDED CLAIM FOR ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT(S) ON THE CASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOLANO, ROMMEL CARRILLO, CYNTHIA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY SOLANO, ROMMEL CARRILLO, CYNTHIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED JUL-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DALEY, WILLIAM (BILL)
REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT WILLIAM DALEY. SUBMITTED TO COURT FOR APPROVAL.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, FILED. COPY OF ORDER TOGETHER WITH INSTRUCTIONS FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE MAILED TO DEFENDANT WILLIAN DALEY.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFFS APPEAR IN COURT. DEFENDANT WILLLIAM DALEY APPEARS BY TELEPHONE AND STIPULATES TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-29-14 ORDERED DESTROYED
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOLANO, ROMMEL CARRILLO, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT DALEY, WILLIAM (BILL) ALAMO CAR RENTAL, ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-31-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
